# hetzner-robot_subnet (Resource)

Manages a subnet's traffic-warning configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Configure traffic warnings for a subnet.
resource "hetzner-robot_subnet" "net" {
  subnet_ip        = "2a01:4f8:1:2::"
  traffic_warnings = true
  traffic_monthly  = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `subnet_ip` (String) Subnet network IP

### Optional

- `traffic_daily` (Number)
- `traffic_hourly` (Number)
- `traffic_monthly` (Number)
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `failover` (Boolean)
- `gateway` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `mask` (Number)
- `server_ip` (String)
- `server_number` (Number)
